channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Option Nyahunzvi Highlights Shona Culture and Traditions in 'Zvatiri' Exhibition
item.description: Option Dzikamai Nyahunzvi, a young Zimbabwean artist born in 1992, is presenting his latest solo exhibition called 'Zvatiri' (Who We Are) at the National Gallery of Zimbabwe. The exhibition celebrates...

item.title: Armed Men on Motorcycles Raid Village Near Woro in Kwara, Loot Phone Shops, No Casualties Reported
item.description: Suspected terrorists on motorcycles enter Gada Oli, one small village near Wawa and close to Woro for Kwara State, late Saturday night. Dem dey fire shots into the air to scatter people and make every...

item.title: Carlton's new strategy tested on opening night against Sydney
item.description: Carlton’s AFL season kicked off with a heavy defeat at the SCG, facing Sydney in the first round of 2026. After trading star forward Charlie Curnow to the Swans in October, Carlton made a series of ca...

item.title: Amit Shah to inaugurate NFSU campus and attend CISF Raising Day in Bhubaneswar
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah is scheduled to visit Bhubaneswar for a two-day programme starting Thursday evening. On Friday, he will lay the foundation for a permanent campus of the National Forensic...

item.title: VW Polo Vivo owners urged to inspect handbrake on 25,729 vehicles
item.description: The National Consumer Commission (NCC) has issued a warning to owners of VW Polo Vivo vehicles manufactured in 2025, following a manufacturer notification about a possible handbrake defect. A total of...

item.title: UK investigates over 60 cases of illness in babies linked to contaminated infant formula
item.description: The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) is investigating more than 60 cases of babies falling ill after consuming infant formula contaminated with the heat-resistant cereulide toxin. The contamination o...

item.title: A Thoughtful Guide to Beautiful and Sustainable Camping
item.description: This article presents a guide to camping that emphasizes intentionality, sustainability, and aesthetic enjoyment of the outdoors. Rather than focusing on overpacking or flashy gear, it encourages camp...

item.title: Congress Aligns with DMK in Tamil Nadu, Reaching New Political Consensus
item.description: In Tamil Nadu, the political landscape has seen the Congress party adjusting to the demands of the DMK once again. This development has sparked a wide range of political discussions as it shows how th...

item.title: Israeli Envoy Confirms Safety Measures for Kenyans and Foreigners in Israel Amid Security Alerts
item.description: The Israeli envoy to Kenya, Gideon Behar, has reassured that Kenyans and other foreign nationals in Israel are currently safe despite ongoing security tensions in the region. Speaking on Capital FM's ...

item.title: Kenya Airways Launches Special Repatriation Flights to and from Dubai Amid Middle East Airspace Disruptions
item.description: Kenya Airways (KQ), the national carrier, has stepped in to help stranded passengers by organising special repatriation flights between Nairobi and Dubai. This comes after serious disruptions in the M...

item.title: Challenges Facing U.S. Efforts to Reduce China’s Control Over Critical Minerals
item.description: The United States recently hosted a critical minerals summit with representatives from multiple countries, including Canada, aiming to reduce China’s dominant role in the global production of lithium-...

item.title: Ofwat proposes £22m fine for South East Water over multiple supply disruptions
item.description: South East Water is facing a proposed £22 million fine from the regulator Ofwat after repeated failures left more than 286,000 residents in Kent and Sussex without tap water between 2020 and 2023. Cus...

item.title: Abia Warriors Lose To El-Kanemi, Continental Qualification Hopes Dim
item.description: Abia Warriors suffer setback in their chase for continental football as El-Kanemi Warriors beat dem 2-0 for Maiduguri on Saturday. The match, part of Nigeria Premier Football League matchday 27, start...

item.title: 10th Infantry Division honors female soldiers with promotions for Women’s Month
item.description: The 10th Infantry Division of the Philippine Army marked the start of its International Women’s Month observance on March 2, 2026, with a ceremony that saw the symbolic donning of higher rank insignia...

item.title: Lam-Adesina Commends APC's Peaceful Congress, Targets Oyo State Come 2027 Elections
item.description: Dapo Lam-Adesina, former House of Representatives member, don yan say the recent congress wey All Progressives Congress (APC) hold for Oyo State show say the party dey ready to regain power for the 20...

item.title: Sri Lanka and India Assist Iranian Ship IRIS Dena Following Distress Call
item.description: Recently, the Iranian ship IRIS Dena faced a distress situation in international waters, prompting immediate assistance from neighbouring countries. Both Sri Lanka and India responded promptly to the ...

item.title: Sydney Swans vs Carlton Blues Opening Round 2026 live updates: Swans pay tribute to Bondi victims as Carlton takes early lead at SCG
item.description: The 2026 AFL season kicked off with a blockbuster clash between the Sydney Swans and Carlton Blues at the SCG. Before the game, both teams and the crowd observed a tribute to the victims and heroes of...

item.title: MultiChoice to discontinue Showmax after review finds streaming losses unsustainable
item.description: MultiChoice, now part of Canal+ SA, has announced that it will discontinue its streaming platform Showmax after a strategic review concluded that the service’s ongoing financial losses are no longer s...

item.title: Pakistan Government Clarifies No Suspension of Port Operations Amid Middle East Tensions
item.description: The government of Pakistan on Thursday officially denied circulating reports that the Cabinet Division had ordered a temporary suspension of all port entries in the country until March 10, calling the...

item.title: AI and 3D Printing Enable Design of High-Performance Refractory Alloys for Aerospace and Defense
item.description: Researchers at Arizona State University and UNSW Sydney are leveraging artificial intelligence (AI) and 3D printing to redesign refractory alloys, metals that maintain strength at extreme heat and str...
